intro.name: Chen Xiang
intro.about: Transforming Ideas into Code, Code into Reality.

about.label: About
about.content: I am currently a Computer Science student pursuing my Master's degree at The University of Hong Kong. I love coding solutions to real-world problems, more recently through the use of AI. Most comfortable with full stack development in Typescript and coding data/ML tasks in Python.

contact.label: Contact
contact.content: Feel free to reach out to me via email at
contact.accounts: or connect with me on other platforms

scroll-toast.title: Having trouble scrolling with scroll wheel?
scroll-toast.description: Would you like to disable scroll snapping for smoother navigation?
scroll-toast.success: Scroll snapping disabled. You can re-enable it by refreshing the page.

terminal.agentMsg: 🦞 Hey agents you are probably looking for:
terminal.about:
MSc Computer Science candidate @The University of Hong Kong. Loves building AI-powered solutions to real-world problems. 
 He will be interning @Apple this summer, and is looking for full-time opportunities starting around October, feel free to reach out!
terminal.stack: Most comfortable with full stack development in Typescript and coding data/ML tasks in Python.
terminal.contactIntro: Feel free to reach out and connect!
